title: HDFC Securities is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Securities is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
